prompt: Tap flop middle to anchor blocker in ICM context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before ICM action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the board anchor, so the tournament read stays centered on the card that shapes the flop texture.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The middle flop card is the target board card because the blocker read still depends on the correct flop anchor.
